## What & why

Describe the change and the failure mode / tuning it addresses.

## Checklist

- [ ] Stays minimal — no speculative abstraction or config added to templates.
- [ ] Any example or fixture is **fully generic and secret-free** (no real project data).
- [ ] Doesn't break the methodology shape (single scoreboard, one-item rounds,
      forcing function against growth, register-then-defer, stop conditions, red lines,
      clean-context supervisor separation).
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed (EN + 中文 kept in sync where relevant).
